seoTitle: Aldine ISD Calendar 2026-2027: Holidays, Breaks, First Day & PDF
seoDescription: View the Aldine ISD Calendar 2026-2027 with first day of school, holidays, Midwinter Break, Spring Break, half day dates, PDF and calendar download.
heroSummary: Aldine ISD calendar 2026-2027 starts Wednesday, August 12, 2026 and ends Thursday, June 3, 2027. The calendar includes student holidays, Thanksgiving Break, Midwinter Break, Spring Break, a student half day, grading periods, PDF download, and calendar import options.
calendarNotes: Aldine ISD starts the 2026-2027 school year on August 12, 2026 and lists June 3, 2027 as the last day of classes. Student holidays run October 12-16 and February 8-12, Thanksgiving Break runs November 23-27, Midwinter Break runs December 21-January 5, and Spring Break runs March 15-19. The official PDF notes that some Aldine ISD schools may have calendar adjustments for specific class schedules, and Ermel, Harris, and Vines have a separate ADSY calendar that families should verify if their student attends one of those campuses.

alternateCalendars.label: 2026-2027 ADSY Calendar for Ermel, Harris, and Vines

calendarFaqs.q: When does Aldine ISD start school in 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: Aldine ISD starts the 2026-2027 school year on Wednesday, August 12, 2026.

calendarFaqs.q: Does Aldine ISD have Fall Break in 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: The district calendar lists student holidays from Monday, October 12 through Friday, October 16, 2026, with staff development on October 12.

calendarFaqs.q: When is Aldine ISD Spring Break in 2027?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring Break runs Monday, March 15 through Friday, March 19, 2027.

calendarFaqs.q: When is Aldine ISD Winter Break 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: Aldine ISD Midwinter Break runs from Monday, December 21, 2026 through Tuesday, January 5, 2027. Classes resume on Wednesday, January 6, 2027.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for Aldine ISD in 2027?
calendarFaqs.a: The last day of classes is Thursday, June 3, 2027. The last day for teachers is Friday, June 4, 2027.

calendarFaqs.q: Where can I download the Aldine ISD calendar PDF?
calendarFaqs.a: The official Aldine ISD 2026-2027 calendar PDF is linked on this page. MySchoolDates also provides a searchable date list and a one-time calendar file for Google Calendar, Apple Calendar, and Outlook.

calendarFaqs.q: How many school days are in Aldine ISD 2026-2027?
calendarFaqs.a: Aldine ISD lists a traditional 2026-2027 academic calendar with a full school-year schedule. Families should use the official district calendar for final instructional-day requirements and campus-specific adjustments.

calendarFaqs.q: Does Aldine ISD have early release days?
calendarFaqs.a: Yes. The 2026-2027 Aldine ISD calendar lists a half day for students on Friday, December 18, 2026.

This page lists planned Aldine ISD calendar dates for the 2026-2027 school year. For weather closures, emergency closures, or same-day updates, families should check official Aldine ISD announcements and campus notifications.

calendarFaqs.q: Where can I find the Aldine ISD teacher calendar?
calendarFaqs.a: Teacher workdays, staff development dates, and the last teacher day appear in the full date list when they are included in the official Aldine ISD calendar source. Staff should still confirm work schedules through Aldine ISD and their campus.

calendarFaqs.q: Does Aldine ISD follow a traditional calendar?
calendarFaqs.a: Yes. This page summarizes the Aldine ISD traditional 2026-2027 academic calendar. The district also lists a separate ADSY calendar for Ermel, Harris, and Vines, so families at those campuses should verify the ADSY PDF.

calendarFaqs.q: Are Aldine ISD calendars different for all schools?
calendarFaqs.a: Most students follow the districtwide Aldine ISD academic calendar, but the official PDF notes that some schools may have calendar adjustments for specific class schedules. Ermel, Harris, and Vines also have an ADSY calendar, so families should confirm campus-specific dates with their assigned school.
Aldine ISD is located in the north Houston area of Harris County, Texas. The district serves families across north Houston and nearby unincorporated Harris County communities.

calendarFaqs.q: Which Aldine ISD schools have an ADSY calendar?
calendarFaqs.a: Aldine ISD lists a 2026-2027 ADSY calendar for Ermel, Harris, and Vines. Families at those campuses should verify dates against the ADSY PDF.

calendarFaqs.q: Can I add the Aldine ISD calendar to Google Calendar?
calendarFaqs.a: Yes. MySchoolDates provides a one-time .ics calendar file generated from the reviewed Aldine ISD calendar records. It can be imported into Google Calendar, Apple Calendar, and Outlook, but it will not automatically update if Aldine ISD revises the official calendar.

customSections.label: Aldine ISD 2026-2027 Calendar Highlights
customSections.content: This section explains the Aldine ISD dates families are most likely to plan around, instead of repeating the full date table. The most important planning windows are the October student holiday week, Thanksgiving Break, Midwinter Break, Spring Break, the December half day, and the final student day.

groups.label: Important planning dates
items: The October 12-16 student holiday week creates a full weekday planning window before the second grading period resumes.
The February 8-12 student holiday week creates another midyear planning window before Spring Break.
The December 18 half day may require adjusted pickup, transportation, and after-school care plans.
Midwinter Break is the longest scheduled student break and is the main winter travel window before classes resume on January 6, 2027.
Spring Break occurs in mid-March, making it the main extended student break before the final grading period of the school year.

yearNumbers.label: First Day
yearNumbers.detail: The first day of classes is Wednesday, August 12, 2026.

yearNumbers.label: Half Day
yearNumbers.detail: A half day for students is listed on December 18, 2026.
